symptom_vector: High CPU utilization, CPU saturation, overload, usage spike, and stress observed during fault period.

reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [recommendationservice] (From Ground Truth)

Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_cpu_usage] in Metric, with values spiking from normal (e.g., 0.03) to fault (e.g., 0.4) for recommendationservice Pods (From Ground Truth key_observations and Full Context metric data).

Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_processes] in Metric, showing increase from 1.0 to 12.0 for all recommendationservice Pods (From Ground Truth key_observations and Full Context metric data).

Step 4: Check Observation - Found keywords [rrt] and [rrt_max] in Metric, indicating significant response time increases, e.g., rrt_max from 22437.0 to 2450581.5 for recommendationservice-2 (From Ground Truth key_observations and Full Context metric data).
Step 5: Derive Root Cause - Based on the abnormal increases in pod_cpu_usage and supporting metric features, determined cause is [pod_cpu_usage] (From Ground Truth key_metrics).

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Value increased significantly during fault period, e.g., for recommendationservice-2, from 0.03 (normal median) to 0.4 (fault median) as shown in Full Context metric data.
critical_checks.instruction: Search for metric [pod_cpu_usage] in the metric data and verify abnormal increase for recommendationservice Pods during the fault time range.

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Value rose from 1.0 to 12.0 for all recommendationservice Pods (recommendationservice-0, recommendationservice-1, recommendationservice-2) as indicated in Full Context metric data.
critical_checks.instruction: Check metric [pod_processes] specifically for recommendationservice Pods and confirm the increase from baseline.

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Response time metric showed surges, e.g., rrt for recommendationservice-2 increased from 4162.73 to 307492.07 as per Full Context metric data.
critical_checks.instruction: Inspect metric [rrt] for recommendationservice and identify spikes correlating with fault time.

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Maximum response time metric exhibited extreme increases, e.g., rrt_max for recommendationservice-2 jumped from 22437.0 to 2450581.5 based on Full Context metric data.
critical_checks.instruction: Examine metric [rrt_max] to detect severe latency anomalies for recommendationservice during the fault window.
